description_long: This is a pair of rectangular sunglasses featuring a full-rim frame with a subtle, slightly curved brow line and a robust, classic silhouette. The frame appears to be made of a dark, wood-textured or tortoiseshell-patterned material, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing ample coverage and protection from sunlight, and are set securely within the frame. The temples are straight with a gentle downward curve at the ends for a comfortable fit behind the ears, and they are of medium thickness, matching the frame's color and style. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, with a gentle dip for nose comfort, and there are no visible nose pads. No visible brand logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a minimalist, timeless design.
description: Rectangular sunglasses with a dark, full-rim frame and dark-tinted lenses, featuring a classic, minimalist design and medium-thick temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and dark-tinted lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, medium-thick temple and the frame's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner frame and the alignment of the temples with the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the consistent frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a slightly curved brow line and medium thickness throughout, offering a robust and classic silhouette with no additional embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark green tint with uniform coloration, providing high opacity and no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated saddle-style bridge with a gentle dip, seamlessly connecting the two lenses without separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight with a slight downward curve at the ends, medium in thickness, and feature a consistent finish with no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
